title: The Sexual Harassment of Women at Workplace (Prevention, Prohibition and Redressal) Act, 2013
full_text: The Sexual Harassment of Women at Workplace (Prevention, Prohibition and Redressal) Act, 2013 महिलाओं का कार्यस्थल पर लैंगिक उत्पीड़न (निवारण, प्रतिषेध और प्रतितोष) अधिनियम, 2013 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 201314 Act Number: 14 Enactment Date: 2013-04-22 Act Year: 2013 Short Title: The Sexual Harassment of Women at Workplace (Prevention, Prohibition and Redressal) Act, 2013 Hindi Title: महिलाओं का कार्यस्थल पर लैंगिक उत्पीड़न (निवारण, प्रतिषेध और प्रतितोष) अधिनियम, 2013 Long Title: An Act to provide protection against sexual harassment of women at workplace and for the prevention and redressal of complaints of sexual harassment and for matters connected therewith or incidental thereto. Ministry: Ministry of Women and Child Development Enforcement Date: 09-12-2013 Notification: 9th December, 2013, vide notification No. S.O. 3606(E), dated 9th December, 2013, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(ii). Short title, extent and commencement. Show Related Subordinates Section 2. Definitions. Show Related Subordinates Section 3. Prevention of sexual harassment. Section 4. Constitution of Internal Complaints Committee. Show Related Subordinates Section 5. Notification of District Officer. Section 6. Constitution and jurisdiction of Local Committee. Show Related Subordinates Section 7. Composition tenure and other terms and conditions of Local Committee. Show Related Subordinates Section 8. Grants and audit. Section 9. Complaint of sexual harassment. Show Related Subordinates Section 10. Conciliation. Section 11. Inquiry into complaint. Show Related Subordinates Section 12. Action during pendency of inquiry. Show Related Subordinates Section 13. Inquiry report. Show Related Subordinates Section 14. Punishment for false or malicious complaint and false evidence. Show Related Subordinates Section 15. Determination of compensation. Section 16. Prohibition of publication or making known contents of complaint and inquiry proceedings. Show Related Subordinates Section 17. Penalty for publication or making known contents of complaint and inquiry proceedings. Section 18. Appeal. Show Related Subordinates Section 19. Duties of employer. Show Related Subordinates Section 20. Duties and powers of District Officer. Section 21. Committee to submit annual report. Show Related Subordinates Section 22. Employer to include information in annual report. Section 23. Appropriate Government to monitor implementation and maintain data. Section 24. Appropriate Government to take measures to publicise the Act. Show Related Subordinates Section 25. Power to call for information and inspection of records. Section 26. Penalty for non-compliance with provisions of Act. Section 27. Cognizance of offence by courts. Section 28. Act not in derogation of any other law. Section 29. Power of appropriate Government to make rules. Show Related Subordinates Section 30. Power to remove difficulties.
